REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2933 Yorba Street, S.F. Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Ernest Der appearing for and with trustee Debra Dolch. Sale is confirmed at $861,000.00. N/B. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Creshon.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Restatement Of William J. Collins' 1988 Trust, For Financial Abuse Of Elder
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der (Counsel for Deborah Dolch, Successor Trustee); Barbara Jagiello (Counsel for Susan Collins); Maria Lawless (Counsel for William Collins).

After brief discussion, the Court granted the Accounting petition, signing the Order for same in open court. Noting that the parties have settled all other matters, the two remaining petitions were taken off calendar.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Restatement Of William J. Collins' 1988 Trust, For Financial Abuse Of Elder
Off Calendar Dec-04-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 288787. Lee Sagatelyan appearing for William J. Collins. Barbara Jagiello appearing for Susan Gee Collins. Ernest Der appearing for Debra Dolch, successor trustee. Case is on appeal. Parties have agreed to mediate this matter. Mediation is set in December. Matter is continued to 1/10/07 for status. Mr. Der will file an amendment to the accounting. All matters are continued to 1/10/07. Judge: Raymond J. Arata. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-04-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Continued To Dec-04-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Restatement Of William J. Collins' 1988 Trust, For Financial Abuse Of Elder
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Continued To Dec-04-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Lee Sagatelyan appearing for William Collins Jr.. Barbara Jagiello appearing for respondent Susan Gee Collins. Answer filed. A 850 petition was filed in the estate. Hearing is set on 12/4. Ms. Jagiello requests for a trial date on this petition. Mr. Sagatelyan argues that the two petitions have the same issues and should be heard together. Matter is continued to 12/4. Court will determine to combine them or not. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Application For Determination That Proposed
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 288787. Levon Sagatelyan appearing for William Collins. Elvira Orly appearing for Barbara Jagiello for the wife. After listening to oral argument, Court rules on Susan Gee Collins' proposed contest and grounds of objection to probate of purported 2005 Will would not violate the no-contest provision of the 2003 Will. Her proposed contest and grounds of objection to probate of purported 2005 Will would violate the no-contest provision of the Restatement of the 1988 Trust and its three amendments. On William Collins, Jr.'s proposed petition to determine validity of the Restatement of Trust would not violate the no-contest clauses contained in the Third Amendment to the William J. Collins 1988 Trust. Each counsel to prepare their order. Court is admitting the 3/1/2005 Will today and appointing William J. Collins, Jr. as the executor with full authority and no bond. Order signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Susan Lee. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
